top_sources.top_context: world today. Before you reach for an SSRI or a benzo, you should at least try some peptides. They don't have the habit-forming effects, and they don't trigger the cascade of downstream side effects that come with most pharmaceuticals. Today I'm walking you through everything you need to know about Selank, the nootropic peptide best known for reducing anxiety. Where Selank Came From Selank was developed by the Institute of Molecular Genetics of the Russian Academy of Sciences in the late 1990s. Like a lot of good peptide research, it came out of Russia. top_sources.top_context: get talked about enough, Semax is great for central nervous system recovery after intense exercise. I love taking it post-workout to wind down the CNS. Regular Semax dosing: 200 to 600 mcg, two to three times per day, intranasally or subcutaneously. I prefer subcutaneous because it works faster. Selank recap Selank is another Russian-developed peptide, derived from Tuftsin. This one is more of an anxiolytic. taylor-williams.female_specific_note: Taylor Williams Coaching focuses on female-specific HRT/peptide guidance. Per-peptide notes here often emphasize female dosing, fertility, hormone interactions.

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology suggests asking the prescribing physician to weigh Hunter Williams's newer library-video instruction: Hunter Williams, Selank How To Use It To Reduce Anxiety (2026-03-29, selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a @ 0:09:54, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a/): "I always say start low and go slow. So start at 100 micrograms, work up to 300 micro grams. Don't feel like I need to go that high, but usually 100 micrograms will do the trick for me."
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams, Selank How To Use It To Reduce Anxiety (2026-03-29, selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a @ 0:07:45, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a/): "In some cases it could cause mild fatigue and drowsiness, but I think that just comes from the anxiolitic effect."
- Hunter Williams, Selank How To Use It To Reduce Anxiety (2026-03-29, selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a @ 0:08:15, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a/): "Obviously we haven't been using these that long so we just don't know like long-term side effects if there are any."
- Hunter Williams, Selank How To Use It To Reduce Anxiety (2026-03-29, selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a @ 0:09:54, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a/): "What I recommend is cycle for two weeks on, two week off."
- Hunter Williams, Selank How To Use It To Reduce Anxiety (2026-03-29, selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a @ 0:10:31, https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/selank-how-to-use-it-to-reduce-anxiety--febe3e9a/): "just going to become ineffective after 8 to 12 weeks."
